---
title: "Data Cleaning for MLB EDA"
author: "Jonah Lorenzo, Nicolas Delfau, Asher Heflin"
date: "March 2026"
output:
  pdf_document: default
  html_document: default
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(baseballr)
library(knitr)
library(readr)
```

Load Data:
```{r}
statcast <- read_csv("statcast_2017.csv") %>%
  rbind(read_csv("statcast_2018.csv")) %>%
  rbind(read_csv("statcast_2019.csv")) %>%
  rbind(read_csv("statcast_2021.csv")) %>%
  rbind(read_csv("statcast_2023.csv")) %>%
  rbind(read_csv("statcast_2024.csv")) %>%
  rbind(read_csv("statcast_2025.csv"))
```

Save Combined Data:
```{r}
write_csv(statcast, "statcast.csv")
```

Remove Unneeded Cols:
```{r}
statcast_clean <- statcast %>%
  select(-matches(".*deprecated$"), -spin_dir, -umpire) %>% #Remove deprecated numbers
  select(-matches("fielder_[0-9]")) %>% 
  select(-matches("on_[1-3]b$")) %>%
  select(-matches("[io]f_fielding_alignment")) %>%
  select(-matches("delta_.*")) %>%
  select(-matches("intercept_ball_.*")) %>%
  select(-matches(".*_days_since_.*"), -matches(".*_days_until_.*")) %>%
  select(-age_pit_legacy, -age_bat_legacy) %>%
  select(-matches("api_.*")) %>%
  select(-woba_value, -woba_denom) %>%
  select(-sz_top,-sz_bot) %>%
  select(-matches(".*score.*"))
  
statcast_clean <- statcast_clean %>%
  drop_na(pitch_type) %>%
  filter(game_type=="R")
#write_csv(statcast_clean, "statcast_clean.csv")
```
